title: Tool Registry, Allowlist, Validation, Dispatch, Results, and Unknown Calls · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in allowlisted tool registry and result envelope and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Register immutable tool name, schema version, handler, effect class, policy, timeout, owner, and result contract in one auditable catalog.
Preserve provider call ID, local attempt ID, interaction ID, tool version, arguments digest, result digest, and timestamps.
Validate and normalize model arguments before policy and execution while retaining rejected input evidence safely.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-unknown-tool-rejection-1h79rr
# Competency: agentpy-unknown-tool-rejection.
# Case 7004: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_unknown_tool_rejection_1h79rr(received_calls: int = 20, dispatched_calls: int = 14, rejected_calls: int = 6, correlated_results: int = 20, duplicate_dispatches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1h79rr = "1h79rr-rr97h1-7004"
    assert evidence_variant_1h79rr
    evidence_axes_1h79rr = (
        "authority1h79rr",
        "interaction7004",
        "toolrr97h1",
        "state1h79rr7004",
        "evaluation70041h79rr",
        "recoveryrr97h17004",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1h79rr)) == 6
    if received_calls < 1 or dispatched_calls < 0 or rejected_calls < 0:
        return False, received_calls, "dispatch-count"
    if dispatched_calls + rejected_calls != received_calls:
        return False, dispatched_calls, "dispatch-reconciliation"
    if correlated_results != received_calls:
        return False, correlated_results, "result-correlation"
    if duplicate_dispatches > 0:
        return False, duplicate_dispatches, "duplicate-dispatch"
    assert dispatched_calls + rejected_calls == received_calls and duplicate_dispatches == 0
    return True, dispatched_calls, "allowlisted-tool-dispatch"
